objective: Highest customer-touch dept — drive automation + omnichannel + 24×7 + CSAT.
main_kpi: First-call resolution; AHT; chatbot deflection rate; CSAT; NPS

tab_content.Overview: Phone (IVR + agent) supports Inbound Channels in Customer Service / Contact Center.
tab_content.Inputs: Primary inputs come from Customer Service / Contact Center systems, customer/broker channels, documents, and external insurance data feeds.
tab_content.AI: Relevant AI agents: Insurance Chatbot Agent, Voice Virtual Agent, Authentication Agent, Intent Classification Agent.
tab_content.Outputs: Outputs include workflow decisions, recommendations, explanations, audit rows, and role dashboard signals for Customer Service / Contact Center.
tab_content.KPIs: First-call resolution; AHT; chatbot deflection rate; CSAT; NPS
tab_content.Governance: Tenant-scoped, role-scoped, PII-redacted by default, and audited per decision.
